content:
First observe that the condition  
p(5)+p(25)=1906  
is equivalent to  
15750a+650b+30c+2d=1906  
⟹ 7875a+325b+15c+d=953.  

On the other hand  
p(15)=3375a+225b+15c+d.  

Eliminate d by d=953−7875a−325b−15c to get  
p(15)=3375a+225b+15c + (953−7875a−325b−15c)  
     =953−4500a−100b  
     =953−100·(b+45a).  

Hence p(15) runs through all integers congruent to 953≡53 mod 100.  The residues ≡53 mod 100 nearest 0 are +53 and −47, so the least possible |p(15)| is  
\boxed{47}.
